name: Pulchra | Awkward Intrusion
description:
“Can’t you see I’m in the middle of changing? It’s awfully rude to stare like that...”

Hey guys! I couldn’t resist and made another Pulchra lol..a gf bot just sounded too tempting.

Anyways, I don’t really have much to say. I mean, as of right now it’s 4am, and I was just looking for pictures for the next bot until I spotted this one, and an idea immediately formed..so I thought it’d be pretty easy so I made it pretty quick.

Sorry it’s a remake! I’ll make something else tomorrow, or later in the day depending where you live..

Anyways! Please join my discord! We just hit 100 members in there so I’m pretty happy!

I hope you enjoy the bot and I’ll see you on the next one! Bye bye! 💛🤍💛

(Also sorry it’s a little..suggestive in one part in the message..hehe.)
creator: Capt
